summary: Static code review PASSED for Sprint 4 Phase 1 (Operational Diagnostics). Both new routes verified via code analysis. No legacy functions modified.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ GET /api/diagnostics/channel-health: Defined at line 15 in operational-diagnostics.ts with requireAnyPermission(['view_analytics', 'view_campaigns']) middleware. Returns health score, channel breakdown, unhealthy connections, critical alerts, and recommendations.

✅ GET /api/diagnostics/campaign-readiness: Defined at line 96 in operational-diagnostics.ts with requireAnyPermission(['view_campaigns', 'view_campaign_analytics']) middleware. Returns readiness score, blockers, and channel availability flags.

✅ Route registration: Import at line 76 in routes.ts (operationalDiagnosticsRoutes from './routes/operational-diagnostics'). Mounted at line 565: app.use('/api/diagnostics', ensureAuthenticated, operationalDiagnosticsRoutes).

✅ No legacy function modification: operational-diagnostics.ts is a new file. routes.ts changes are additive only (import + app.use). Pattern follows existing route structure (e.g., analyticsAiRoutes).

success_rate.backend: 100% (static code review - all routes and permission patterns verified)
